name: Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A.
description: Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. is Peru's largest publicly traded precious metals company and a major holder of mining rights in Peru. The company is engaged in the exploration, mining, processing, development, and sale of gold, silver, copper, zinc, and lead. Founded in 1953, Buenaventura operates several mines in Peru and holds a significant interest in Minera Yanacocha and Sociedad Minera Cerro Verde.
